title: Ek Hasina Do Diwane
subTitle: Best friends Amar and Prakash love Neetu, but she marries Amar against her father's wishes. Their different lifestyles create problems and Prakash makes things worse.

title: Har Har Gange
subTitle: A defeated Paap comes to Earth to seek revenge and create havoc until Goddess Ganga decides to end him and purify the planet.

title: Ghar Jamai
subTitle: Dwarka, a millionaire, is impressed by Anil, a principled man, and wants him to marry Mona, his daughter. However, after their marriage, he compels him to move into his house.

title: Inteha Pyar Ki
subTitle: Rohit, a multimillionaire, goes to Palampur on a business trip where he meets Tania and falls in love with her. However, they meet with an accident just before their wedding.

title: Hasina Maan Jayegi
subTitle: Two army officers, Kamal and Rakesh, are lookalikes. Rakesh plans to kill Kamal and woo his beautiful wife Archana. However, things don't go as planned.

title: Kirayadar
subTitle: When Anil, son of their absentee landlord, arrives in Mumbai and asks them to move out of his home, Laxmi and Jaya's lives turn chaotic.

title: Pratigyabadh
subTitle: Shankar grows up to become the right hand man of a gangster. His goal in life is to take revenge on the moneylender who left his family homeless and a truck driver who molested and killed his mother.

title: Batwara
subTitle: Amidst the fall of princely states in post-independence India, the friendship between aristocrat Vikram and a peasant is tested. Vikram turns vengeful after his brother is killed in a peasant colony.

title: Bhala Manus
subTitle: Shankar, a young man from a rural area, tries to turn his life around after entering a world of smuggling after travelling to Mumbai.

title: Badrinath Yatra
subTitle: After Devdutt gets arrested, his mother, who is about to go on a pilgrimage, cancels her trip. Things take a turn for the worse when he starts visiting a brothel and ignores his pregnant wife.

title: New Delhi
subTitle: An honest journalist, is declared unstable and falsely imprisoned after he exposes two corrupt politicians. Years later, he returns to seek revenge against his wrongdoers.

title: Sautela Bhai
subTitle: A teacher betroths his stepbrother to the daughter of a rich man but discovers that he is already married. However, things take a turn when the girl's father finds out.

title: Shaan
subTitle: After their cop brother dies at the hands of a ruthless gangster, Vijay and Ravi are determined to find the gangster and take their revenge.

title: Agnee Prem
subTitle: Sangeeta, the daughter of business tycoon Seth Deen Dayal and Rahul, a middle-class boy, fall deeply in love. However, their union is threatened by various obstacles that challenge their love.

title: Dil Aur Mohabbat
subTitle: A widowed police officer raises his son with good values and sends him to the city for further studies. Later, he discovers that his son has been accused of a double murder.

title: Dil Hai Betaab
subTitle: Meena and Raja, who are in love with each other, decide to marry. However, when her father's employer asks for Meena's hand in marriage, he accepts his proposal and ruins his daughter's life.

title: Doosri Dulhan
subTitle: A couple, unable to have children after a miscarriage, decides to hire a prostitute as a surrogate mother. However, they begin to face challenges that come with surrogacy.

title: Kohram
subTitle: Colonel Balbir Singh Sodhi assumes a disguise to unveil the true colours of Veer Bhadra Singh, a corrupt minister. Soon, Major Ajit teams up with him to execute the mission.

title: Aurat Teri Yehi Kahani
subTitle: Savitri, a motherless girl, is forced to marry an elderly man for her family's sake. However, after her husband's sudden death, her life takes a turn for the worse.

title: Movie
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.
